basic_details.job_title: SAM Tripura Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Medical Officer / Community Health Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: State AYUSH Mission Tripura (SAM Tripura) has released the official Medical Officer / Community Health Officer Notification 2026 on 15 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced under the SAM Tripura Medical Officer / Community Health Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 40 years with a qualification of BHMS, BAMS or equivalent can apply via email from 22 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PH candidates.

qualification.details: Medical Officer (Homoeopathy): BHMS from an Institution recognized under HCC Act. 1973/ Central Council of Homoeopathy including compulsory internship of 1 (one) year duration after passing the final degree examination. The candidate must have a valid Registration of the Central or a State Council. Desirable: Knowledge of Bengali/ Kokborok. Medical Officer (Ayurveda): BAMS or its equivalent Degree from a recognized Ayurvedic Medical Institution and completion of 1 (one) year compulsory internship training after passing of B.A.M.S or its equivalent. The candidate must have a valid Registration of the Central or a State Council. Desirable: Knowledge of Bengali/ Kokborok. Community Health Officer, Ayush: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine & Surgery (BAMS) from an Ayurvedic Medical Institution recognized by the Central Council of Indian Medicine (CCIM)/NCISM OR Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine & Surgery (BHMS) from a Homoeopathic Medical Institution recognized by the Central Council of Homoeopathy (CCH)/ NCH.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer (Homoeopathy): Rs.35,000.00 Per Month Medical Officer (Ayurveda): Rs.35,000.00 Per Month Community Health Officer, Ayush: Rs.25,000.00 plus performance based incentive up to Rs.15,000.00 Per Month

selection_process: Academic Performance Index (API) - 50 marks Viva-voce / Personality Test - 50 marks Merit List Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SAM Tripura Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
